arts.ttl: Augsburg defender opens up on interest from Roma: "A huge compliment for me"
arts.sum: Noahkai Banks has revealed that it was a "huge compliment" for him to find out that Roma were interested in signing him during the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd ruin Arsenal’s chances of signing Nico Williams
arts.sum: The report states that United are the best placed team - along with Liverpool - to sign Raphinha, who has enjoyed the best season of his career with 27 goals and 19 assists in all competitions from 41 games. However, CaughtOffside reports that Man Utd are interested in signing Barcelona winger Raphinha this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to sign Nico Williams as Gyokeres makes Man Utd decision

arts.ttl: Roma and Lazio Formally Confirm Two Contract Extensions
arts.sum: Leandro Paredes will stay at Roma for at least another year, while Lazio have locked up Christos Mandas long-term. The Giallorossi had been working on such a deal.
